field_values.action_summary: Dorothy performs the ritual of the Golden Cap, standing on different feet and reciting the magic words. The Winged Monkeys descend from the sky to obey her command to fly them to the Emerald City.
field_values.camera_intent: Low-angle hero shots of dorothy performing ritual; Sweeping aerial shots of winged_monkeys arrival; Fast-paced movement shots during lift-off
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Precise sequence of dorothy feet placement and magic words
Specific arrival pattern/descent order of winged_monkeys
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH014_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute the ritual of the Golden Cap through specific physical movements and incantations to trigger a high-energy transition from ground-based tension to aerial exhilaration.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto
- winged_monkeys (including Monkey King)

## Required Environments
- scarlet_flower_fields

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise sequence of dorothy feet placement and magic words.
- Specific arrival pattern/descent order of winged_monkeys.

## Beat List
- BT001: Ritual of the Golden Cap (Feet/Words sequence)
- BT002: Descent of the Monkeys (Arrival pattern)
- BT003: Aerial Ascent (Group lift-off)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
